items.title: Musicians Union Sues Universal and Warner Over AI Use
items.summary: The American Federation of Musicians claims major labels breached their collective bargaining agreement

items.title: Duffy Announces First Live Show in 15 Years

items.title: Ariana Grande Launches First Tour Since 2019
items.summary: The Oakland Arena show featured live debuts of a number of songs and the return of older hits like “Break Free” and “Into You”
